message:
bench: include webgpu backend in the 3-way comparison

bench.spec.ts now reports tjs/wasm/webgpu medians side-by-side so
cold-start warmup and per-forward latency can be tracked together.
Steady-state M-series Chromium (2 warmups + 5-sample median):

  short:  tjs=29ms  wasm=66ms  gpu=13ms  (gpu  2.2x faster than tjs)
  medium: tjs=39ms  wasm=158ms gpu=32ms  (gpu  1.2x faster)
  long:   tjs=57ms  wasm=341ms gpu=73ms  (gpu 1.28x slower)

Cold-start (HF weights cached, pipeline compile + weight upload only):
  tjs=13.5s  wasm=12.3s  gpu=12.8s
